# DQNOA: A Problem-Adaptive Deep Q-Network Optimization Algorithm for Continuous and Engineering Problems
This repository contains the source code implementation of the Deep Q-Network Optimization Algorithm (DQNOA)  
DQNOA is a novel evolutionary optimization method designed to address complex continuous optimization problems.

#Generated by Najibeh Farzi-Veijouyeh
---

# 📌 Features

- DQNOA:
  - DQNOA: A Problem-Adaptive Deep Q-Network Optimization Algorithm for Continuous and Engineering Problems.
  - Strong balance between exploration and exploitation.
  - Effective on unimodal, multimodal, composite, and benchmark optimization problems (CEC2019, CEC2022).
  - Scalable to high-dimensional problems.
